project: You and Emmanuel run competing ATM companies.
Unfortunately, Emmanuel just bagged an exclusive deal with DNA Industries for the fastest CPU on the market.
If people find out that Emmanuel's ATMs are really this much faster than yours, you could go out of business.
If you want to save your company, your only option is to go undercover as an ATM and give people withdrawls yourself. But how?
The number on the left is how much money your customer wants. The number on the right is how much you've given them.
All you have to do is click and drag these notes to the flashing facilitator before the timer runs out.
Try to keep your business afloat for as long as you can. Ready?
